SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign

Class SteamNetwork

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign.SteamNetwork
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SteamNetwork extends Object implements Serializable
Screening-level multi-pressure steam network balancer.

Manages a cascade of steam headers (for example HP / MP / LP) with a steam demand and an optional local generation (waste-heat boilers, let-down turbine exhaust) at each level. Steam is supplied to the highest-pressure header by a fired Boiler and cascades down through let-down stations to satisfy the lower-pressure header demands; local generation at a header reduces the let-down required from above. The network sizes the boiler make-up generation and a Deaerator for the boiler feedwater. It is deterministic and intended for early-stage utility screening.

Usage example: 

 
 SteamNetwork net = new SteamNetwork("Steam System");
 net.addLevel("HP", 41.0, 252.0);
 net.addLevel("MP", 11.0, 184.0);
 net.addLevel("LP", 4.5, 148.0);
 net.addDemand("MP", 8000.0); // kg/h
 net.addDemand("LP", 5000.0);
 net.setLocalGeneration("LP", 2000.0); // waste-heat steam
 net.calculate();
 double boilerSteam = net.getBoilerGenerationKgh();
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • SteamNetwork

      public SteamNetwork()
      Creates a steam network with the default name.

    • SteamNetwork

      public SteamNetwork(String name)
      Creates a named steam network.
      Parameters:
      name - network name

  • Method Details

    • addLevel

      public void addLevel(String name, double pressureBara, double saturationTempC)
      Adds a steam header. Headers are automatically ordered by decreasing pressure.
      Parameters:
      name - header name
      pressureBara - header pressure in bara
      saturationTempC - saturation temperature in °C

    • findHeader

      private SteamNetwork.SteamHeader findHeader(String levelName)

    • addDemand

      public void addDemand(String levelName, double demandKgh)
      Adds a steam demand to a header.
      Parameters:
      levelName - header name
      demandKgh - steam demand in kg/h (must be non-negative)

    • setLocalGeneration

      public void setLocalGeneration(String levelName, double generationKgh)
      Sets the local steam generation at a header (replacing any previous value).
      Parameters:
      levelName - header name
      generationKgh - local generation in kg/h (must be non-negative)

    • calculate

      public void calculate()
      Balances the steam network, sizing the make-up boiler generation and the deaerator.

    • ensureCalculated

      private void ensureCalculated()

    • toResultsMap

      public Map<String,Object> toResultsMap()
      Builds an ordered results map suitable for JSON serialization.

      ordered results map

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the steam network results to pretty-printed JSON.

      public void setSteamEnthalpyRiseKJperKg(double value)
      Sets the steam enthalpy rise from feedwater to generated steam.
      Parameters:
      value - enthalpy rise in kJ/kg

    • setCondensateReturnFraction

      public void setCondensateReturnFraction(double value)
      Sets the condensate return fraction.
      Parameters:
      value - condensate return as a fraction of generated steam
